title: Create project structure and configs
completion_summary: Created complete React project structure with all directories, configuration files (tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts, vite-env.d.ts, .gitignore, .env.example), entry points (main.tsx, App.tsx), public files (index.html, manifest.json), and global styles (global.css with design system variables). Ready for next phases.
acceptance_criteria: Directory structure created matching PHASE2_CORE_FRONTEND.md spec
vite.config.ts created with path aliases and proxy configuration
tsconfig.json created with strict mode and path mapping
.env and .env.example created with all required variables
npm run dev starts server on port 3000
npm run build completes without errors
